title: Section 6A
content: 1[6A. Repeal of Act making textual amendment in Act or Regulation.--Where any 2[Central Act] or Regulation made after the commencement of this Act repeals any enactment by which the text of any2[Central Act] or Regulation was amended by the express omission, insertion or substitution of any matter, then, unless a different intention appears, the repeal shall not affect the continuance of any such amendment made by the enactment so repealed and in operation at the time of such repeal.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 19 of 1936, s. 2. 2. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Act of the Governor-General in Council".
